name: Brand Book Template
description: Brand Book Template - Marketing template for brand professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template 1. Brand Foundation Define your brand purpose, mission, vision, values, and personality. 2. Visual Identity Document your logo system, colour palette, typography, and imagery style. 3. Tone of Voice Establish your brand voice, writing guidelines, and dos/don'ts. 4. Messaging Architecture Build your messaging hierarchy from tagline to elevator pitch to key messages. 5. Application Guidelines Set rules for how brand elements are applied across channels. 6. Asset Library Catalogue all brand assets with versions, formats, and access links. 7. Brand Audit Score your brand c

sections.title: Dashboard
sections.description: Auto-calculated summary of your data. Complete the working sections to see results here.

fields.label: Dashboard Overview
fields.placeholder: Dashboard metrics will be calculated from your inputs in the working sections

sections.title: General
sections.description: [Brand Foundation] Fill in the fields below

fields.label: Brand Purpose
fields.placeholder: Why does your brand exist beyond making money? What change do you want to create in the world?
fields.helpText: Why does your brand exist beyond making money? What change do you want to create in the world?

fields.label: Mission Statement
fields.placeholder: What you do, who you do it for, and how you do it differently. Keep it under 25 words.
fields.helpText: What you do, who you do it for, and how you do it differently. Keep it under 25 words.

fields.label: Vision Statement
fields.placeholder: Where you aspire to be. Paint a picture of the future your brand is helping to create.
fields.helpText: Where you aspire to be. Paint a picture of the future your brand is helping to create.

fields.label: Brand Promise
fields.placeholder: The single most important commitment you make to your customers.
fields.helpText: The single most important commitment you make to your customers.

fields.label: Brand Values
fields.placeholder: List 3-5 core values that guide everything your brand does. Be specific — not generic.
fields.helpText: List 3-5 core values that guide everything your brand does. Be specific — not generic.

fields.label: Brand Personality
fields.placeholder: If your brand were a person, how would you describe them? List 5 personality traits.
fields.helpText: If your brand were a person, how would you describe them? List 5 personality traits.

fields.label: Brand Archetype
fields.placeholder: Which archetype best represents your brand? (e.g., Hero, Explorer, Sage, Creator, Caregiver, Rebel)
fields.helpText: Which archetype best represents your brand? (e.g., Hero, Explorer, Sage, Creator, Caregiver, Rebel)

fields.label: Target Audience
fields.placeholder: Who is your primary audience? Describe demographics, psychographics, and behaviors.
fields.helpText: Who is your primary audience? Describe demographics, psychographics, and behaviors.

fields.label: Brand Positioning
fields.placeholder: How you want to be perceived relative to competitors. Complete: For [audience] who [need], [brand] is the [category] that [differentiator] because [reason to believe].
fields.helpText: How you want to be perceived relative to competitors. Complete: For [audience] who [need], [brand] is the [category] that [differentiator] because [reason to believe].

fields.label: Competitive Differentiation
fields.placeholder: What makes you fundamentally different from alternatives? List 3 key differentiators.
fields.helpText: What makes you fundamentally different from alternatives? List 3 key differentiators.

fields.label: Brand Story
fields.placeholder: Your origin story — why you started, what drives you, the problem you saw and set out to solve.
fields.helpText: Your origin story — why you started, what drives you, the problem you saw and set out to solve.
